title: Analyze Stream Piping Paradigms
description: Compare and contrast `.pipe()` and `stream.pipeline()` for connecting Node.js streams. Analyze the error propagation mechanisms in different stream piping paradigms. Utilize `stream.pipeline()` for robust error handling and automatic resource teardown in complex stream compositions.
objectives: Compare and contrast `.pipe()` and `stream.pipeline()` for connecting Node.js streams.
Analyze the error propagation mechanisms in different stream piping paradigms.
Utilize `stream.pipeline()` for robust error handling and automatic resource teardown in complex stream compositions.
